title: pinalia pellipes
intro: Pinalia pellipes, also known as the yellow pinesap orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Pinalia. Traditionally, Pinalia pellipes has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pinalia pellipes include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Pinalia pellipes can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is often used in traditional medicine in Southeast Asia, particularly in Indonesia and Malaysia.
